code:
import io
import string
import list

fn flush(_ token: String, _ evens: List<Int>, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  if string.len(token) == 0
    evens
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v % 2 == 0
        list.push(evens, v)
      else
        evens
      end
    when None
      evens
    end
  end
end

fn flush_odds(_ token: String, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  if string.len(token) == 0
    odds
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v % 2 == 0
        odds
      else
        list.push(odds, v)
      end
    when None
      odds
    end
  end
end

fn join_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    evens = flush(token, evens, odds)
    odds = flush_odds(token, odds)
    token = ""
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
evens = flush(token, evens, odds)
odds = flush_odds(token, odds)

println("evens=#{join_list(evens)}")
println("odds=#{join_list(odds)}")
